name: Almond Baked Cod
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fish into serving size pieces.
2. Spray a 12 x 8-inch ovenproof pan with non-stick spray.
3. Coat each piece of fish with flour and salt mixture.
4. Place the coated fish in a single layer in the pan.
5. Pour butter, lemon juice, and lemon peel over the fish.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes.
7. Sprinkle with slivered roasted almonds and chopped green onion.
8. Serves 6.
